calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Withdraw Funds From Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Phillips in Pro Per. Darryl Phillips (Brother).

Mr. Phillips expressed a desire to have the money put in his name and reported that he was now living in Oakland. Darryl Phillips stated that he lived in Hayward and that he had continual communication with his brother Michael. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
